hooks.command: AUTODEV_HOOK=session-start; AUTODEV_ROOT="${AUTODEV_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}}"; for AUTODEV_ROOT_CAND in "$AUTODEV_ROOT" . "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/autodev-marketplace/autodev"/* "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplace/autodev"/*; do [ -n "$AUTODEV_ROOT_CAND" ] || continue; if [ -x "$AUTODEV_ROOT_CAND/hooks/run-hook.cmd" ]; then exec "$AUTODEV_ROOT_CAND/hooks/run-hook.cmd" "$AUTODEV_HOOK"; fi; done; printf '{}\n'

AUTODEV_HOOK=pre-tool-scope-guard; AUTODEV_ROOT="${AUTODEV_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CODEX_PLUGIN_ROOT:-${CURSOR_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}}}}"; for AUTODEV_ROOT_CAND in "$AUTODEV_ROOT" . "$HOME/.codex/plugins/cache/autodev-marketplace/autodev"/* "$HOME/.claude/plugins/marketplace/autodev"/*; do [ -n "$AUTODEV_ROOT_CAND" ] || continue; if [ -x "$AUTODEV_ROOT_CAND/hooks/run-hook.cmd" ]; then exec "$AUTODEV_ROOT_CAND/hooks/run-hook.cmd" "$AUTODEV_HOOK"; fi; done; printf '{}\n'
